overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character jogging along a rain-slicked sidewalk in a historic New Orleans-style district at dusk. The character moves under covered awnings past brick buildings with wrought iron balconies while street lamps illuminate the wet pavement and pedestrians carry umbrellas.

events.description: passes two pedestrians with umbrellas walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the covered sidewalk toward pedestrians with umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk in a historic district, passing a one-way sign and palm trees. The camera approaches and passes two pedestrians carrying umbrellas who are walking in the opposite direction, while vintage cars remain parked along the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk transitioning past street furniture

agents.ego_description: continuing to jog along the empty sidewalk past street furniture and changing building facades

decorative black wrought iron fire escape and balcony structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues jogging along the covered walkway past a trash can and red fire hydrant. The architecture transitions from white stucco to red brick buildings with wrought iron balconies, while the street remains empty of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with commercial storefronts and parking area

events.description: green and white PARKING AREA sign comes into view on the left side

agents.ego_description: jogging past the parking area sign and continuing along the covered walkway toward distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas walking ahead in the same direction under the awning

entered.detail: green and white rectangular sign reading PARKING AREA
circular sign with number 25 mounted on brick wall
blue painted wooden door with glass panels and white frame

segments.scene_description: The character jogs past a green PARKING AREA sign on the left and continues along the covered walkway past commercial storefronts with a blue door and numbered signage. The street shows sparse moving traffic, and pedestrians with umbrellas become visible again in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked sidewalk in a historic district as the architecture shifts from white stucco to red brick. It begins with the character jogging under a covered walkway past palm trees and a one-way sign, weaving past pedestrians carrying umbrellas while vintage cars line the street. As the character continues forward past a red fire hydrant, the surroundings transition into a row of red brick buildings adorned with wrought iron balconies. The scene then opens up past a green parking sign and commercial storefronts with blue doors, before finally revealing sparse traffic and more distant pedestrians under umbrellas ahead.
